patch.value:
Bug class #1 (option-key normalization). Runtime normalizes --dry-run to dryRun; handler read ctx.options["dry-run"] (always undefined).
Repro: pm todos import TODO.md --dry-run
Observed: actually imported 5 items (before=0 after=5), printed "Imported 5". Exit 0.
Expected: write nothing, print [dry-run] previews.
Fix: added readBoolOption(options,"dry-run","dryRun"). Verified before=0 after=0, prints [dry-run] previews.

author: codex

patch.value: Fixed via readBoolOption. Verified --dry-run writes nothing (before=0 after=0).

message: Fixed via readBoolOption. Verified --dry-run writes nothing (before=0 after=0).
